title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Targets Iranian Navy Commander in Airstrike, Israeli Officials Say
summary_full: Israel’s military targeted Alireza Tangsiri, who has played a pivotal role in shutting down the Strait of Hormuz, according to three Israeli officials.
